case_title: CARITAS MANAGEMENT COMPANY VS. KIMBERLY ADAMS et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF REPORTER FEE PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT ADAMS, KIMBERLY ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF REPORTER FEE PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 (CRC 3.62)
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-26-2007 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 218

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ADAMS, KIMBERLY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 670 NATOMA STREET #210, SF $6,582.00 RENT, $1,000.00 ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,582.00, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED "JUDGMENT FOR UNLAWFUL DETAINER FOLLOWING DEFAULT UNDER TERMS OF SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT [CCP SECTION 664.6]"

REQUEST TO SET CASE FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT COMPANY JURY TRIAL SET FOR JUL-30-2007 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS

DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $77.70 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT COMPANY
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT ADAMS, KIMBERLY DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF JURY FEES AND EXPENSES PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT ADAMS, KIMBERLY ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF JURY FEES AND EXPENSES PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 (CRC 3.62)

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ADAMS, KIMBERLY
